it was a quiet day in Green-hills, birds chirping, random animals wandering around. the usual, you decide to take a stroll taking in the best scenery you will never get tired of as you would hear the airplane named the tornado flying in the air with Tails manning it as usual, then when you cross a river you would see the blue blur himself pass by
